rules.description: Front and rear wheel axle type must match frame dropout type
Wheel hub width must match frame/fork spacing
Brake caliper mount standard must match frame/fork mount
Disc rotor diameter must match caliper adapter size
Bottom bracket standard must match frame BB shell
Headset standard must match frame head tube diameter
Suspension fork travel must not exceed frame max travel rating
Cassette speed count must match shifter/derailleur speed count
Chain width must match cassette speed spacing
Brake cable type (mechanical/hydraulic) must match lever and caliper type
Battery voltage must match controller supported voltage
Motor wattage must not exceed controller max wattage
Controller must support the sensor type installed
Seatpost diameter must match frame seat tube inner diameter
